reason: Strong oncall runbook but model+index drifted post-C9.14/C9.13: doc says SigLIP v1 + IVFFlat, code is SigLIP-2 + HNSW; bge-reranker missing.

staleClaims.actual: code uses SigLIP-2: SIGLIP_MODEL_VERSION='siglip2-base-patch16-224@v1' (siglip-onnx.adapter.ts:30), env default ./models/siglip2-base-patch16-224.onnx (env.ts:335). C9.14 swap.

staleClaims.claim: kNN search — pgvector `halfvec(768)` cosine, IVFFlat index
staleClaims.actual: migration uses HNSW USING hnsw halfvec_ip_ops m=16/ef_construction=64 (AddArtworkEmbeddings:78), NOT IVFFlat. Dims 768 + halfvec + cosine-via-IP correct.

staleClaims.claim: search dominant -> REINDEX with higher `lists` parameter
staleClaims.actual: lists is IVFFlat-only; HNSW tunes m/ef_construction/ef_search. Advice inapplicable to actual HNSW index.
IVFFlat-specific; index is HNSW (no lists param).
actual index name IDX_artwork_embeddings_hnsw (migration:78); referenced name does not exist.

staleClaims.claim: Known limitations omits any reranker / bge mention
staleClaims.actual: C9.13 shipped bge-reranker-v2-m3 scaffold: RERANK_PROVIDER env (null|bge-reranker-v2-m3), default null/no-op in V1 (env.types.ts:431, env-resolvers.ts:145). Doc never mentions it.

updatePlan: 1) L10/L23: SigLIP-2 (siglip2-base-patch16-224@v1, C9.14 commit 1a3e8d18); note Replicate fallback lags at SigLIP v1 (embeddings.factory.ts). 2) L11: replace 'IVFFlat' with HNSW (halfvec_ip_ops m=16/ef_construction=64), keep halfvec(768) cosine-via-IP. 3) L80/L87: rewrite REINDEX advice for HNSW (tune ef_search/m, real index name IDX_artwork_embeddings_hnsw), drop IVFFlat 'lists'. 4) Add C9.13 bge-reranker-v2-m3 note (RERANK_PROVIDER, default null no-op in V1, scaffold throws). 5) Verify modelVersion examples in alerts use new string.
wouldLoseInfo: High-value oncall runbook: failure modes, Sentry alert PromQL specs, Grafana/Langfuse/Prometheus wiring, ingestion CLI. Must edit in place, not delete.
